_enabled: Master switch — when false, this plugin is skipped during indexing and Go files fall through to the generic text indexer.
_extensions: File extensions this plugin claims (lower-case, leading dot).
_extract_comments: Extract `// TODO`-style comment nodes from each file.
_comment_tags: Tags surfaced as comment nodes when `extract_comments` is true.
_extract_calls: Walk function bodies for callsites so the graph can draw `calls` edges. Disable on very large codebases for faster indexing.
_ignore_dirs: Folder names the indexer skips when this plugin is enabled.
_ignore_files: Glob patterns for files the indexer should skip.
